infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MuskMaker needs camera access to take goal verification photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MuskMaker Premium can use your location to enable 1-photo instant verification for certain goal types. Location is never used for free users.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: MuskMaker does not access your photo library. All photos must be taken with the in-app camera.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: MuskMaker does not save photos to your library.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: MuskMaker Premium uses location for 1-photo instant verification only.

plugins.cameraPermissionText: MuskMaker needs camera access to take goal verification photos.
